diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Process Cycle
diagrams.description: Shows the continuous cycle of capacity planning from analysis to monitoring
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand the iterative nature of capacity planning and remember all steps involved

diagrams.title: Resource Types for Software Company
diagrams.description: Four key resource categories that need capacity planning
diagrams.purpose: Visual reminder of all resource types to consider when planning capacity

diagrams.title: Capacity Utilization Zones
diagrams.description: Traffic light diagram showing optimal, warning, and critical utilization levels
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for interpreting capacity utilization metrics and knowing when to take action

diagrams.title: Horizontal vs Vertical Scaling
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing how to scale systems
elements: Vertical: Single server → More CPU/RAM → Bigger server
Horizontal: One server → Multiple servers → Load balancer
diagrams.purpose: Visual distinction between the two scaling approaches for quick understanding
